data.name: Teach Me Master
data.detailed_description:
An adult visual novel blending martial arts, passion, and redemption.

You're Russell (name customisable) and were once a professional fighter, climbing the ranks and making a name for yourself. A humiliating loss shattered your career, sending everything spiralling out of control. Sponsors pulled their support, and opportunities disappeared overnight. With no clear direction, you drifted from one meaningless night to the next. When a couple of drunk fans pushed you too far at a bar, you snapped. By the time it was over, they were the ones left broken, and you were facing serious jail time.

Instead of prison, an unexpected deal gave you another option. A judge offered an alternative sentence: provide self-defense training to women for free. It wasn’t what you wanted, but it kept you out of a cell. With no other choice, you accepted.

Your first trainee, Naomi, already has some martial arts experience. She knows the techniques but struggles with confidence. At first, the training is just a requirement to fulfil, but as you work together, you see potential in her. With the right guidance, she could become a serious competitor.

Desperate for a way to fix everything, you come up with a plan. Naomi has skill, and professional fighting pays well. If she competes, she can earn real money. She needs a manager, and with your experience, you are the right person for the job. Training intensifies as you push her to reach her limits, sharpening both her technique and her mindset. She is strong, but the road to becoming a true fighter is brutal. Every day brings new challenges, both inside and outside the ring.

Spending so much time together strengthens your bond with Naomi. Long hours, shared struggles, and physical training sessions create an undeniable closeness. The connection between you deepens, and attraction grows. The choices you make will shape your relationship and define how everything unfolds.

Martial arts is more than just fighting. It is discipline, strategy, and mental resilience. Everything you do will influence the story, from how you train Naomi to how you deal with the people from your past. The journey ahead is intense, but the path forward is yours to decide.

data.short_description: Once a rising fighter, your career fell apart after a brutal loss. A bar brawl puts you in legal trouble, forcing you to train women in self-defense. Naomi has potential, and managing her as a pro could solve your problems. A choice-driven adult visual novel filled with martial arts and desire.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
